title: Protocol for Evaluating In Vivo the Activation of the P2RX7 Immunomodulator
author: Janho dit Hreich, Juhel, et al.
materials: 1 ml syringe omnifix-F (Braun, catalog number 9161406 V)
96-well clear V bottom plates (Greiner, catalog number 651101)
20X Buffer S, enzyme D and enzyme A from the mouse lung dissociation kit (Miltenyi Biotech, catalog number 130–095-927)
ACK lysis buffer (Gibco, catalog number A1049201)

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: The described methods include the description of the work, along with general guidelines that can be used for implementing the strategy with various compounds described to modulate P2RX7 activity.

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Anesthetize mouse i.p. with a mixture of 25 mg/kg ketamine and 2.5 mg/kg xylazine using 1 ml syringe with a 26G needle.

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Place mouse in a box with 5% isoflurane for 1 minute.

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: When asleep, mouse is held upright and was given 25 μl of TO-PRO™-3 (1 μM/kg) in one nostril then 25 μl of ATP (100 mM) or 1X PBS in another using a micropipette.

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Spray mouse thorax with 70% ethanol. Harvest lungs using fine and sharp scissors and pliers.

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Separate the lobes. Transfer the lobes into a GentleMACS™ C-tube (Miltenyi Biotech) containing the enzymatic buffer for dissociation (Lung dissociation kit, Miltenyi Biotech)

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Dissociate lungs using the 37_m_LDK1 program on a GentleMACS™ Octo dissociator with heaters (Miltenyi Biotech)

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: At the end of the program, resuspend cells and pass them through a 100 μm cell strainer on top of a 50 ml tube for single cell suspensions. Wash the GentleMACS™ C-tube with 1X Buffer S (Lung dissociation kit, Miltenyi Biotech) for maximum retrieval of cells and pass them though the 100 μm cell strainer.

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Discard the cell strainer and centrifuge the tube at 1200 rpm 4 °C for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Aspirate completely the supernatant and resuspend pellet gently with 1 ml of ice-cold ACK lysis buffer (Gibco) for 30 seconds to lyse red blood cells.

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Add 30 ml of 1X PBS for stopping the reaction.

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1200 rpm 4 °C for 5 minutes

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Add 1 million of lung single cells in 150 μl 1X PBS in a 5 ml polypropylene tube

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Add 150 μl of Green Live/Dead stain (2X) (Invitrogen) or 1X PBS (unstained control) into the 5 ml polypropylene tube

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Transfer cell suspension to a 96 well V plate

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Centrifuge plate at 1300 rpm 4 °C for 3 minutes

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Block Fc receptors using anti-CD16/32 (dil 1/100, BD Biosciences) diluted in FACS Buffer (1X PBS, 5% FBS, 0.5% EDTA) in the dark under agitation for 10 minutes

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Centrifuge plate at 1300 rpm 4 °C for 3 minutes

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Add antibody mix diluted in FACS buffer and homogenize immediately using a multichannel pipette.Antibodies: CD45 BUV395 (dil 1/100, BD Biosciences), P2RX7 PE (dil 1/8, Biolegend) or isotype control rat IgG2b κ PE (dil 1/8, Biolegend).

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Cells were acquired using the CytoFLEX LX (Beckman Coulter)

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Pipette

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Pipette tips

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: AnestheticsPrepare 25 mg/kg of ketamine and 2.5 mg/kg of xylazine in 1X Dulbecco’s PBS as per 250 μl of mix per 25 g of mouse.

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: Lung dissociation bufferDilute 20X Buffer S in double distilled water and store at 4 °C. Resuspend enzyme A and enzyme D with 1X Buffer S according to manufacturer’s instructions. Add 2.4 ml of 1X Buffer S, 15 μl of enzyme A and 100 μl of enzyme D per GentleMACS™ C-tube (Miltenyi Biotech)

steps.title: Methods
steps.instruction: ATPPrepare 100 mM stock of ATP in sterile 1X PBS, pH 6.8, aliquot and store at − 80 °C.

steps.title: Time 60 Minutes – Red Blood Lysis and Live/Dead Staining
steps.instruction:
/!\ Prepare appropriate number of samples without Live/Dead staining for single-stained controls
7.Vortex and incubate in the dark at room temperature for 30 minutes8.Add 3 ml of FACS buffer (PBS 5% FBS 0.5% EDTA) into the 5 ml polypropylene tube9.Centrifuge at 1200 rpm 4 °C for 5 minutes10.Aspirate supernatant completely and resuspend cells in 100 μl FACS Buffer

steps.title: Time 60 Minutes – Red Blood Lysis and Live/Dead Staining
steps.instruction: /!\ Keep cells in the dark at all times, and on ice unless otherwise stated.

steps.title: Time 60 Minutes – Red Blood Lysis and Live/Dead Staining
steps.instruction: Aspirate completely the supernatant and resuspend pellet gently with 1 ml of ice-cold ACK lysis buffer (Gibco) for 30 seconds to lyse red blood cells.

steps.title: Time 60 Minutes – Red Blood Lysis and Live/Dead Staining
steps.instruction: Add 30 ml of 1X PBS for stopping the reaction.

steps.title: Time 60 Minutes – Red Blood Lysis and Live/Dead Staining
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 1200 rpm 4 °C for 5 minutes

steps.title: Time 60 Minutes – Red Blood Lysis and Live/Dead Staining
steps.instruction: Add 1 million of lung single cells in 150 μl 1X PBS in a 5 ml polypropylene tube

steps.title: Time 60 Minutes – Red Blood Lysis and Live/Dead Staining
steps.instruction: Add 150 μl of Green Live/Dead stain (2X) (Invitrogen) or 1X PBS (unstained control) into the 5 ml polypropylene tube

steps.title: Time 90 Minutes – Surface Staining
steps.instruction: Transfer cell suspension to a 96 well V plateCentrifuge plate at 1300 rpm 4 °C for 3 minutesFlick the plateBlock Fc receptors using anti-CD16/32 (dil 1/100, BD Biosciences) diluted in FACS Buffer (1X PBS, 5% FBS, 0.5% EDTA) in the dark under agitation for 10 minutesCentrifuge plate at 1300 rpm 4 °C for 3 minutesFlick plateAdd antibody mix diluted in FACS buffer and homogenize immediately using a multichannel pipette.Antibodies: CD45 BUV395 (dil 1/100, BD Biosciences), P2RX7 PE (dil 1/8, Biolegend) or isotype control rat IgG2b κ PE (dil 1/8, Biolegend).

steps.title: Time 90 Minutes – Surface Staining
steps.instruction:
/!\ Prepare appropriate single-stained controls
8.Incubate at 4 °C in the dark under agitation for 20 minutes9.Add 100 μl of FACS buffer per well using a multichannel pipette10.Centrifuge plate at 1300 rpm 4 °C for 3 minutes11.Flick the plate12.Resuspend cell in 100 μl of FACS buffer

steps.title: Time 90 Minutes – Surface Staining
steps.instruction: /!\ Keep cells in the dark at all times, and on ice.

steps.title: Time 90 Minutes – Surface Staining
steps.instruction: Transfer cell suspension to a 96 well V plate

steps.title: Time 90 Minutes – Surface Staining
steps.instruction: Centrifuge plate at 1300 rpm 4 °C for 3 minutes

steps.title: Time 90 Minutes – Surface Staining
steps.instruction: Block Fc receptors using anti-CD16/32 (dil 1/100, BD Biosciences) diluted in FACS Buffer (1X PBS, 5% FBS, 0.5% EDTA) in the dark under agitation for 10 minutes

steps.title: Time 90 Minutes – Surface Staining
steps.instruction: Centrifuge plate at 1300 rpm 4 °C for 3 minutes

steps.title: Time 90 Minutes – Surface Staining
steps.instruction: Add antibody mix diluted in FACS buffer and homogenize immediately using a multichannel pipette.Antibodies: CD45 BUV395 (dil 1/100, BD Biosciences), P2RX7 PE (dil 1/8, Biolegend) or isotype control rat IgG2b κ PE (dil 1/8, Biolegend).

steps.title: Time 110 Minutes – Flow Cytometry Analysis
steps.instruction: Cells were acquired using the CytoFLEX LX (Beckman Coulter)Samples were analyzed using FlowJo (LLC)

steps.title: Time 110 Minutes – Flow Cytometry Analysis
steps.instruction: Cells were acquired using the CytoFLEX LX (Beckman Coulter)

steps.title: Reagent Preparation
steps.instruction:
/!\ Prepare all reagents in sterile conditions using a PSM II tissue culture hood
AnestheticsPrepare 25 mg/kg of ketamine and 2.5 mg/kg of xylazine in 1X Dulbecco’s PBS as per 250 μl of mix per 25 g of mouse.Lung dissociation bufferDilute 20X Buffer S in double distilled water and store at 4 °C. Resuspend enzyme A and enzyme D with 1X Buffer S according to manufacturer’s instructions. Add 2.4 ml of 1X Buffer S, 15 μl of enzyme A and 100 μl of enzyme D per GentleMACS™ C-tube (Miltenyi Biotech)ATPPrepare 100 mM stock of ATP in sterile 1X PBS, pH 6.8, aliquot and store at − 80 °C.

steps.title: Reagent Preparation
steps.instruction: Dilute TO-PRO™-3 in 1X PBS to 1 μM/kg.

steps.title: Reagent Preparation
steps.instruction:
/!\ Aliquot TO-PRO™- 3 stock and avoid freeze/thaw cycles
5.LIVE/DEAD™ fixable green dead cell staining kit

steps.title: Reagent Preparation
steps.instruction: Dilute LIVE/DEAD™ in 1X PBS to 2X working concentration per tube. Add 0.4 μL LIVE/DEAD™ in 150 μL per tube.

steps.title: Reagent Preparation
steps.instruction:
/!\ Manipulate LIVE/DEAD™ green in the dark
6./!\ Prepare mix of appropriate volume7.FACS BufferPrepare 500 ml of FACS Buffer containing 1X Dulbecco’s PBS, 5% FBS, 0.5% EDTA and store at 4 °C.

steps.title: Reagent Preparation
steps.instruction:
/!\ Keep on ice at all times
8.Antibody mix cocktailDilute CD45 BUV395 (dil 1/100) and P2RX7 PE (dil 1/8) or isotype control rat IgG2b κ PE (dil 1/8) in FACS Buffer.

steps.title: Reagent Preparation
steps.instruction: /!\ Keep on ice at all times and manipulate in the dark.

steps.title: Reagent Preparation
steps.instruction: AnestheticsPrepare 25 mg/kg of ketamine and 2.5 mg/kg of xylazine in 1X Dulbecco’s PBS as per 250 μl of mix per 25 g of mouse.

Add 2.4 ml of 1X Buffer S, 15 μl of enzyme A and 100 μl of enzyme D per GentleMACS™ C-tube (Miltenyi Biotech)
